overall.description: Static shot of a large animated digital billboard in a futuristic urban night setting, displaying a cycling advertisement with glitch effects. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetics with a yellow-toned promotional display.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban building facade with large digital advertisement

events.description: digital glitch effect with vertical purple scan lines temporarily distorts the billboard image during content transition

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of an animated digital billboard advertisement

entered.detail: large rectangular digital screen displaying animated advertisement with yellow gradient background
dark building wall surrounding the billboard with metallic paneling
horizontal street light arm extending from the left side of the frame
illuminated vertical light strips running along the right edge of the building
small illuminated signs visible in the dark background on the left

segments.scene_description: Static view of a large digital billboard mounted on a building facade in a futuristic urban night environment. The billboard cycles between displaying a full-body advertisement with promotional text and a close-up portrait view. A brief digital glitch effect with vertical distortion lines occurs at approximately 16 seconds during a content transition. Neon lighting from the billboard and adjacent vertical strips illuminates the dark surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective on a towering digital billboard that cycles through promotional content within a dark, neon-lit futuristic cityscape. It begins with a full-body advertisement and accompanying text illuminating the building facade and surrounding vertical light strips. As the display transitions, the image shifts into a close-up portrait view of the subject. The scene then experiences a momentary digital glitch, characterized by vertical distortion lines that flicker across the screen before the display stabilizes. Finally, the billboard continues its cycle, casting a persistent yellow glow against the deep shadows of the urban night.
